actions.title: Inspect current Git remotes
actions.reason: Remote state was inspected before generating this bootstrap artifact.

actions.title: Regenerate publish handoff evidence
actions.command: python .repers/scripts/repers.py publish-handoff --remote-name origin --remote-url C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\repers-remote-apply-xv6nlmck\remote.git --base-branch main --pr-title "Install RePERS fixture runtime" --json

actions.title: Verify objective audit after remote setup
actions.reason: Run after the remote is configured and publish handoff is refreshed.

actions.title: Push release branch
actions.reason: Clean committed branch and remote are available.

actions.title: Open draft pull request
actions.command: gh pr create --draft --base main --head master --title "Install RePERS fixture runtime" --body-file C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Temp\repers-remote-apply-xv6nlmck\output\repers-publish-handoff.md
actions.reason: Requires GitHub CLI authentication and a pushed branch.
